title: SuperEnchant
description: Adds a new command which allows players to enchant items up to level 255
body: A simple plugin to bypass the survival mode enchantments with a new command. Use /superenchant <player> <enchantment> <level> to enchant the holding tool with a specific enchantment level. To execute this command, players need to have the permission `superenchant.use`. Default, only operators have it.
